info_CN: 减论Agent通过算法为您推荐
该方法通过解耦和时空自适应机制
结合Moiré调节的混合自适应Transformer
有效解决了视频去摩尔纹中的空间变化、全局结构、通道依赖及时间一致性问题
The Chung-Ang University proposed the Moiré Conditioned Hybrid Adaptive Transformer (MoCHA-former)
which integrates Decoupled Moiré Adaptive Demoiréing (DMAD) and Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Demoiréing (STAD) components to address spatially varying artifact strength
and temporal fluctuations in video demoiréing
info_EN: The Chung-Ang University proposed the Moiré Conditioned Hybrid Adaptive Transformer (MoCHA-former)
which integrates Decoupled Moiré Adaptive Demoiréing (DMAD) and Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Demoiréing (STAD) components to address spatially varying artifact strength
and temporal fluctuations in video demoiréing
